rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

DEFENDANTS MICHAEL MILLER AND BORDSKY, BASKIN & MILLER, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED BECAUSE DEFENDANT HAS NOT CITED EITHER NEW LAW OR NEW FACTS. rulings.Case Title: JERALD J. TISHKOFF VS. ALLEN TECHNOLOGIES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 21, 2008 LINE 8. CROSS-DEFENDANT JERALD TISHKOFF'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE COURT DECLINES TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE DECLARATIONS. THE FOLLOWING ALLEGATIONS OF THE COMPLAINT ARE SUFFICIENT TO SUPPORT THE CAUSES OF ACTION. FIRST, SECOND AND THIRD: PARAGRAPHS FIVE THROUGH SEVEN, FIFTEEN AND EIGHTEEN THROUGH THIRTY-FOUR. FOURTH: PARAGRAPHS FIVE AND FIFTY-NINE THROUGH SIXTY-FOUR. 5TH: PARAGRAPHS SIXTY-SIX THROUGH SIXTY-SEVEN. 6TH: PARAGRAPHS ELEVEN, TWELVE, SIXTEEN, SIXTY-NINE THROUGH SEVENTY-ONE. 7TH: PARAGRAPHS SEVENTY -FOUR THROUGH SEVENTY-FIVE. =(302/PJM/VC)
